title: 10 best herbal teas for cramps
description: Echinacea purpurea, also known as purple coneflower, teas helps with cramps because of its anti-inflammatory properties. The tea has been traditionally used to reduce muscle spasms and alleviate menstrual cramps. The compounds in Echinacea purpurea, such as alkylamides and caffeic acid, are believed to inhibit the production of prostaglandins, which are hormone-like substances that cause pain and inflammation in the uterus.
